title: Cookie Notice Clause
description: The policy should inform users about the use of cookies and tracking technologies.
fix: Add a clear statement indicating if and how cookies or tracking technologies are used, and provide a link to your Cookie Policy.

title: Consent Mechanism
description: The policy must outline how explicit consent is obtained from data subjects.
fix: Add a section explaining that processing is based on consent, and detail how users can withdraw consent at any time.

title: Data Retention Policy
description: The policy must specify the criteria used to determine the retention period for personal data.
fix: Define explicit retention periods or state that personal data is only kept as long as necessary for the specified purposes.

title: Data Subject Rights
description: The policy must inform users of their rights to access, rectify, erase, and restrict processing of their personal data.
fix: Add a dedicated section detailing user rights (access, rectification, erasure/deletion, portability, objection) and explain how users can exercise these rights.

title: Technical and Organizational Security Measures
description: The policy must state that appropriate security measures are implemented to protect personal data.
fix: Include details about security controls, such as SSL/TLS encryption, access controls, firewalls, and regular security audits.
